valueUnbound(HttpSessionBindingEvent) - Method in class io.goobi.viewer.model.security.user.User
VariableReplacer - Class in io.goobi.viewer.model.variables
Replace variable expression denoted by {variable-name} in strings.
VariableReplacer(Configuration) - Constructor for class io.goobi.viewer.model.variables.VariableReplacer
Only replace configuration variables.
VariableReplacer(Configuration, StructElementStub, StructElementStub, StructElementStub, PhysicalElement) - Constructor for class io.goobi.viewer.model.variables.VariableReplacer
Take variable values from the given config and structure elements.
VariableReplacer(StructElementStub) - Constructor for class io.goobi.viewer.model.variables.VariableReplacer
Take variable values from global configuration and the given struct element.
VariableReplacer(ViewManager) - Constructor for class io.goobi.viewer.model.variables.VariableReplacer
Take variable values from current struct element and page of the given navigationHelper.
VariableReplacer(Map<String, Map<String, List<String>>>) - Constructor for class io.goobi.viewer.model.variables.VariableReplacer
Specifically replace the variables defined in the given replacement map.
version - Variable in class io.goobi.viewer.servlets.oembed.OEmbedResponse
 
Version - Class in io.goobi.viewer
Provides version information about the currently running Goobi viewer core.
VERSION - Static variable in class io.goobi.viewer.Version
Constant VERSION.
VersionInfo(String, String, String, String, String) - Constructor for class io.goobi.viewer.managedbeans.AdminDeveloperBean.VersionInfo
 
VIDEO - Enum constant in enum class io.goobi.viewer.model.viewer.record.views.FileType
 
View - Class in io.goobi.viewer.model.maps
Determines the visible area of a GeoMap.
View(double, double, double) - Constructor for class io.goobi.viewer.model.maps.View
 
View(double, Point) - Constructor for class io.goobi.viewer.model.maps.View
 
ViewAttributes - Class in io.goobi.viewer.controller.model
Used to check whether a zoomImageView configuration block should be applied to the image view represented by the given viewManager and pageType Stores PageType (the type of view, like fullscreen or viewImage), MimeType of the current page, the number of pages in the record, the main DocStructType of the record and the collections (based on SolrConstants.DC) of the record.
ViewAttributes(MimeType, Integer, String, List<String>, PageType) - Constructor for class io.goobi.viewer.controller.model.ViewAttributes
create an instance based on individual values.
ViewAttributes(PageType) - Constructor for class io.goobi.viewer.controller.model.ViewAttributes
 
ViewAttributes(PhysicalElement, PageType) - Constructor for class io.goobi.viewer.controller.model.ViewAttributes
 
ViewAttributes(PhysicalElement, StructElement, PageType) - Constructor for class io.goobi.viewer.controller.model.ViewAttributes
create an instance based on a page and StructElement, along with a PageType.
ViewAttributes(ViewManager, PageType) - Constructor for class io.goobi.viewer.controller.model.ViewAttributes
Creates an instance from a ViewManager All values may be null if they can be ignored for the check.
ViewBean - Class in io.goobi.viewer.managedbeans.storage
JSF backing bean for storing variables in view scope.
ViewBean() - Constructor for class io.goobi.viewer.managedbeans.storage.ViewBean

viewBookmarkListAction.

SOLR field name containing the name of the viewer instance.
VIEWER_URL - Static variable in class io.goobi.viewer.model.variables.ReplacerVariables
 
ViewerConfigurationException - Exception Class in io.goobi.viewer.exceptions
Exception that is thrown if an essential configuration element is missing.

Creates a new ViewerConfigurationException instance.

JPA entity representing a message in the internal message queue.

ViewerMessage(String) - Constructor for class io.goobi.viewer.controller.mq.ViewerMessage
 
ViewerPage - Class in io.goobi.viewer.api.rest.model
Simple template to create a json-representation of a viewer page, typically a CMS-Page.
ViewerPage(CMSPage) - Constructor for class io.goobi.viewer.api.rest.model.ViewerPage
 
ViewerPage(URI, IContent, IMetadataValue, long) - Constructor for class io.goobi.viewer.api.rest.model.ViewerPage
 
ViewerPath - Class in io.goobi.viewer.model.urlresolution
Stores the url path of a http request organized by its logical parts so application url, application name, view type and parameter urls can be retrieved independendly.
ViewerPath() - Constructor for class io.goobi.viewer.model.urlresolution.ViewerPath
Creates an empty ViewerPath.
ViewerPath(ViewerPath) - Constructor for class io.goobi.viewer.model.urlresolution.ViewerPath
Creates an exact copy of the passed blueprint.
ViewerPathBuilder - Class in io.goobi.viewer.model.urlresolution
Offers static methods to create ViewerPaths from a http request.
ViewerRecordPDFResource - Class in io.goobi.viewer.api.rest.v1.records.media
REST resource for serving PDF representations of entire digitized records with access control.
ViewerRecordPDFResource(ContainerRequestContext, HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse, AbstractApiUrlManager, String, ContentServerCacheManager) - Constructor for class io.goobi.viewer.api.rest.v1.records.media.ViewerRecordPDFResource
 
ViewerResourceBundle - Class in io.goobi.viewer.messages
Custom ResourceBundle implementation that loads and merges viewer message files from configurable locations.
ViewerResourceBundle() - Constructor for class io.goobi.viewer.messages.ViewerResourceBundle
Creates a new ViewerResourceBundle instance.
ViewerResourceBundle(Path) - Constructor for class io.goobi.viewer.messages.ViewerResourceBundle
Creates a new ViewerResourceBundle instance with the given local config path.

Binding to handle exception in requests by the WebApplicationExceptionMapper.

viewFulltext - Enum constant in enum class io.goobi.viewer.model.viewer.PageType
 
ViewHistory - Class in io.goobi.viewer.model.urlresolution
Offers methods to store information about the current and previous html-view (page) in the session store.
viewImage - Enum constant in enum class io.goobi.viewer.model.viewer.PageType
When adding new types, also update isDocumentPage() and isCmsPage()!
ViewManager - Class in io.goobi.viewer.model.viewer
Holds the full state of the currently open record: document structure, physical pages, TOC, image delivery settings, and navigation.
ViewManager(StructElement, IPageLoader, String, String, String, ImageDeliveryBean) - Constructor for class io.goobi.viewer.model.viewer.ViewManager
Creates a new ViewManager instance.

VisibilityCondition - Class in io.goobi.viewer.model.viewer.record.views
A class containing all conditions to possibly check for when deciding whether to display a page element for a record page.
VisibilityCondition(AnyMatchCondition<FileType>, AnyMatchCondition<String>, AnyMatchCondition<String>, Condition<String>, AnyMatchCondition<PageType>, AnyMatchCondition<String>, ComparisonCondition<Integer>, ComparisonCondition<Integer>) - Constructor for class io.goobi.viewer.model.viewer.record.views.VisibilityCondition
 
VisibilityCondition(VisibilityConditionInfo) - Constructor for class io.goobi.viewer.model.viewer.record.views.VisibilityCondition
 
VisibilityConditionInfo - Class in io.goobi.viewer.model.viewer.record.views
Interchange class to pass visibility conditions from the jsf fronend to a backing bean.
VisibilityConditionInfo() - Constructor for class io.goobi.viewer.model.viewer.record.views.VisibilityConditionInfo
 
volume - Variable in class io.goobi.viewer.model.viewer.StructElementStub
True if this element is a volume element.
volumeNo - Variable in class io.goobi.viewer.model.viewer.StructElementStub
Volume label of this element (only for records that are part of a multi-volume record).
volumeNoSort - Variable in class io.goobi.viewer.model.viewer.StructElementStub
Volume number of this element (only for records that are part of a multi-volume record).
VoyagerSceneBuilder - Class in io.goobi.viewer.model.media.voyager
Builder that constructs a Smithsonian Voyager scene document (JSON) for one or more 3D model assets, including asset metadata, scene nodes, and derivative descriptions.
VoyagerSceneBuilder(String) - Constructor for class io.goobi.viewer.model.media.voyager.VoyagerSceneBuilder
